free_text: Inelastic scattering of neutrons with initial energy
9.1+-0.2 MeV  and the density of nuclear levels .
.Hollow cylinders with outer diameter 5 cm, inner
diameter 1.5 cm, length 6 cm. Natural isotope mixture.
Time of flight method with resolution 2.5 nsec/m,
For monitoring: two counters - all-wave and
Cross sections were measured relative to the (n,p)
scattering cross section taken from fast
I.B.Marion and I.L.Fowler, New York, London, 1960.
.Corrections is introduced on multiple scattering and
receiving of nuclear temperature and nuclear level
